learnerValue: Tests both the numbering rule and identification of level 1, with three distinct misconceptions.
Distinguishes biomass from organism count and biomass transfer while testing pyramid orientation.
Tests the precise definition against plausible confusion with food safety and national self-sufficiency.
Tests a specified environmental example while challenging overgeneralisation and denial of its effect.
Requires recall of both stated efficiency controls and separates them from the distinct role of high-protein feed.
Checks that learners retain both complementary controls used to conserve fish stocks.
Tests culture conditions and downstream processing while distinguishing mycoprotein production from bacterial insulin production.
